metadata.description: Sample events for testing the data pipeline. Prices are approximate; real candlestick prices will be fetched in Plan 01-03.

events.title: US Q3 2024 real GDP growth rate
events.question: Will real GDP increase by more than 2.9% in Q3 2024?
events.description: Bureau of Economic Analysis advance estimate of Q3 2024 real GDP annualized growth rate, released October 30, 2024.

events.title: US Q2 2024 real GDP growth rate
events.question: Will real GDP increase by more than 2.4% in Q2 2024?
events.description: Bureau of Economic Analysis advance estimate of Q2 2024 real GDP annualized growth rate, released July 25, 2024.
